text.title: seo Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for seo as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Disallowing Googlebot or all AI crawlers in robots.txt by accident (e.g. shipped staging robots to prod)
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Site disappears from index within days; recovery requires reindex requests and may take weeks

failure-mode.description: Relying on client-side rendering without prerendering for crawl-critical pages
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Some crawlers (notably AI bots and Bingbot) execute JavaScript inconsistently; content may be missed

failure-mode.description: Stuffing schema with FAQ/HowTo blocks that do not match visible page content
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Google penalizes mismatched structured data; rich results are revoked and trust score drops

failure-mode.description: Multiple H1 tags or missing H1, duplicate titles across paginated archives
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Confuses both classic and AI crawlers about page topic, dilutes ranking signals

failure-mode.description: hreflang pairs that are not bidirectional or omit x-default
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Google ignores the cluster and serves wrong-language pages to international users

failure-mode.description: Optimizing only for Google and ignoring AI crawlers (no llms.txt, no entity markup, content gated behind login walls)
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Lose the growing share of zero-click and AI-assisted traffic; competitors get cited instead
